name: Screenshot, OCR & Record Remix
author: Mathew-D
description: Remix of the original Screenshot, OCR & Record plugin by Pulsar. Supports Sway, Hyprland, and MangoWM/MangoWC (region-only). Take screenshots, perform OCR, use Google Lens, and record your screen. Window detection lets you click a window to capture or record it (available on Sway and Hyprland, can be toggled in settings).
